prompt: Ultra-high-resolution deep space astrophotography, pitch black void background (#080808 to pure black). Massive crimson and blood-red nebula dominating the center-right of the frame with extremely intricate wispy tendrils of ionized hydrogen gas stretching across the field of view. Dark ruby gas clouds with complex internal structure showing density gradients and turbulent flow patterns. Thousands of individual stars scattered across the frame in varying sizes from pinpoint to prominent, the brightest 8-10 stars featuring vivid red-tinted six-point diffraction spikes. Subtle dark maroon dust lanes cutting across the nebula creating dramatic silhouettes against the glowing gas. Three distant spiral galaxies visible in the background with warm reddish hues from extreme redshift. Faint ember-like particle effects and scattered micro-nebulosity throughout. Deep vermillion emission regions with sharp bright edges transitioning to dark crimson cores. Extremely fine detail in the gas structure showing filamentary wisps, shock fronts, and Kelvin-Helmholtz instabilities in the nebula edges. Shot with equivalent of 200mm telescope at f/4, 120-minute tracked exposure, ISO 1600, processed in narrowband Ha-SII-OIII mapped to red palette. No planets, no text, no watermarks. James Webb Space Telescope NIRCam quality remapped to deep red-black palette. The mood is dark, dramatic, cinematic, and premium. Do not add any artificial glow, lens flare, or chromatic aberration. Do not smooth or simplify the gas structure. Maintain maximum fractal complexity in all nebula detail.
negative_prompt: planets, text, watermark, logo, smooth gradients, oversimplified nebula, cartoon, illustration, digital art, CGI, artificial glow, lens flare, chromatic aberration, blue tones, green tones, purple tones, bright background, white background, grey background, overexposed, washed out, low detail, blurry, soft focus, anime, painting style, oil painting, plastic look, skin smoothing, beautification
